with open\('app/code/Weline/Server/Console/Server/Stop.php', 'rb'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

rq = b'\\xe2\\x80\\x9d'
count_lq = content.count\(lq\)
count_rq = content.count\(rq\)
print\('Left curly quotes: %d, Right curly quotes: %d' % \(count_lq, count_rq\)\)
fixed = content.replace\(lq, b'\\"'\).replace\(rq, b'\\"'\)
with open\('app/code/Weline/Server/Console/Server/Stop.php', 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(fixed\)
print\('Fixed and written.'\)
")
